title: Shelviety
description: Unifies regular and chiseled bookshelves, and adds variations to regular bookshelves.
body:
Updates the Bookshelf texture to match with the Chiseled Bookshelf texture, making bookshelves more seamless with each other. Alongside this, variants to the regular bookshelf are added, in order to prevent endlessly repeating walls of the same books. 

Should work between 1.14 _(Assumedly)_ and any latest versions. Chiseled bookshelf top texture included so it can work before they were added too!

**HUGE THANKS to demonjoeTV for showcasing Shelviety in his video!**
